title: daucus commutatus
intro: Daucus commutatus, also known as wild carrot or garden carrot, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating menstrual cramps, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Daucus commutatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible medicinal plant.
